mapper.insert: INSERT INTO reservations ( guest_id, house_id, status, checkin_date, checkout_date, total_price, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{guestId}, #{houseId}, #{status}, #{checkinDate}, #{checkoutDate}, #{totalPrice}, NOW(), NOW() )
mapper.select: SELECT reservation_id AS reservationId, guest_id AS guestId, house_id AS houseId, status, checkin_date AS checkinDate, checkout_date AS checkoutDate, total_price AS totalPrice, created_at AS createdAt, updated_at AS updatedAt FROM reservations WHERE reservation_id = #{reservationId} AND guest_id = #{guestId}

SELECT reservation_id AS reservationId, guest_id AS guestId, house_id AS houseId, status, checkin_date AS checkinDate, checkout_date AS checkoutDate, total_price AS totalPrice, created_at AS createdAt, updated_at AS updatedAt FROM reservations WHERE reservation_id = #{reservationId}
